title: Hospitalists
description: Provide inpatient care predominantly in settings such as medical wards, acute care units, intensive care units, rehabilitation centers, or emergency rooms. Manage and coordinate patient care throughout treatment.

tasks.text: Diagnose, treat, or provide continuous care to hospital inpatients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prescribe medications or treatment regimens to hospital inpatients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Order or interpret the results of tests such as laboratory tests and radiographs (x-rays).
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct discharge planning and discharge patients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write patient discharge summaries and send them to primary care physicians.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Refer patients to medical specialists, social services, or other professionals as appropriate.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct, coordinate, or supervise the patient care activities of nursing or support staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend inpatient consultations in areas of specialty.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Communicate with patients' primary care physicians upon admission, when treatment plans change, or at discharge to maintain continuity and quality of care.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in continuing education activities to maintain or enhance knowledge and skills.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct or support quality improvement projects or safety programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct the operations of short stay or specialty units.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train or supervise medical students, residents, or other health professionals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
